entries.title: Non-record: Content-Dependent SmearGate (1.6795 BPB, RTX 4070)
entries.summary: Modulates SmearGate gating with adjacency dot-product similarity so similar tokens blend more while keeping parameter/compute cost minimal.

entries.title: Record: 11L XSA + EMA + Int6 MLP3x + WD=0.04 (val_bpb: 1.1271)
entries.summary: 11-layer µP transformer adds Exclusive Self Attention in final layers plus stepwise EMA averaging, retaining int6/zstd compression and tuned Muon updates for compact inference.

entries.title: Record: 10L Int5-MLP + SmearGate + BigramHash + Late QAT (val_bpb=1.1628)
entries.summary: Mixed int5 MLP/int6 attention export plus SmearGate, BigramHash, Muon decay, SWA warmdown, and late QAT to fit a 10-layer ReLU² under 16MB.

entries.title: Add non-record local A100 TTT eval-stride0 submission
entries.summary: Local 1xA100 non-record run uses LoRA TTT with standard EVAL_STRIDE=0 and a 600s cap to seed the 16MB leaderboard.

entries.title: Add non-record local A100 PR60-stack reproduction
entries.summary: Reproduces the PR60-style 10-layer stack with FP16 tied embeddings, Muon WD, overtone init, residual mixing, and sliding eval on 1×A100 under 600s.

entries.title: Non-record: val_bpb=1.1374, FA2+SWA adaptation of Farnsworth
entries.summary: Adapt FarnsworthEngine with FA2 FlashAttention fallback, INT6 quant, MUON WD tuning, SWA, and TTT for artifact-size-aware compression.

entries.title: Title: AtomLogic v3.2 Universal SOTA - 1.15 BPB Target
entries.summary: Shares one Universal Transformer block over 20 iterations with value-only MoE binary-mask experts, VeRA zero-leakage TTT, and Muon optimizer.

entries.title: Record: 8L Paid Prefix + Sparse Hard Blocks (1.0365)
entries.summary: Inline builds a sparse hard-block paid prefix by ranking sliding-window NLL and caching top 256-token losses for the 8L SmearGate/BigramHash model.

entries.title: Non-record: 11L Int6 + XSA + TTT + SmearGate + BigramHash (pending compute)
entries.summary: Combines XSA on the final layers with TTT adaptation on top of an 11L muP stack featuring SmearGate/BigramHash and int6 quantization.

entries.title: Non-record: local RTX 4070 shared-depth RMS interface v0
entries.summary: Local RTX 4070 run of a shared-depth RMS-interface GPT (8 logical/4 physical layers) using extra pre-projection RMSNorm and phase-conditioned scales.

entries.title: Non-record: Paid Prefix Research (val_bpb=1.0539, ruled out-of-scope)
entries.summary: Hybrid paid-prefix approach stores compressed val tokens alongside an 8L SmearGate transformer to trade model size for coverage within artifact budget.

entries.title: [Non-record] Seq2048 + EMA + Council-Optimized Warmdown
entries.summary: Seq2048, EMA weight averaging, and a council-optimized 5000-step warmdown with lower Muon LR/momentum refine the 10L baseline training regimen.

entries.title: Non-record: 10L Int6 QAT + SmearGate + SWA (val_bpb=1.1575)
entries.summary: 10-layer model swaps depth for throughput, pairing int6 QAT, per-dimension SmearGate, SWA, and sliding-window eval to maximize 10-min/16MB training.

entries.title: Non-record: 10L mixed int5/int6 export reaches ~10.4MB with strong throughput
entries.summary: Valid 10L core run tests subsystem-specific int5/int6/int8 export plus tiny eval-time SGD on control knobs to probe aggressive compression.

entries.title: Non-record: HyperparamTuned KV2 + FP16 Embed
entries.summary: Halved KV heads, retuned Muon/Adam LR+momentum with shorter warmdown, and exported FP16 tied embeddings to keep throughput neutral.

entries.title: Record: 11L Int6 + SmearGate + BigramHash + Depth Recurrence
entries.summary: Depth recurrence loops a shared block via per-iteration embeddings so an int6-quantized Transformer can afford wider dims within 16MB.

entries.title: Record: val_bpb: 1.14020 [tested 3x on 8xh100]
entries.summary: Causal chunk-wise test-time training evaluates each validation chunk before updating a 10-layer GPT with int5/int6 quantization, BigramHash embeddings, and SWA.

entries.title: Non-record: Mixture of Softmax K=2 R=64 (1xH100, 10min, 1.3932 bpb)
entries.summary: Adds K=2, rank-64 Mixture of Softmax head to baseline 9×512 GPT to raise output matrix rank with little parameter overhead.

entries.title: Record: 11L + Efficient Partial XSA (val_bpb: 1.1307)
entries.summary: Applies Efficient Partial Exclusive Self Attention only to the deepest three layers via GQA-aware reshape on an 11-layer GPT with U-Net skips.

entries.title: 11L Int5-MLP + TTT-SGD + SmearGate + SWA (1.1455 BPB)
entries.summary: Int5-MLP/int6-attn quantization funds an 11-layer Relu^2 Transformer with SmearGate/Bigram context, SWA, and TTT-SGD prep for sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Non-record: TTT + QAT on Consumer GPU (val_bpb=1.5382)
entries.summary: Combines QAT-triggered cheaper matmuls with per-batch test-time training on attention and MLP projections for a laptop GPU submission.

entries.title: Record: 8L Paid Prefix + SmearGate + Int6 (val_bpb=1.0539)
entries.summary: 8-layer SmearGate+BigramHash transformer with int6+zstd pairs a 10% LZMA-paid validation prefix to zero-out those targets for compression.

entries.title: submission: QK Gain Init 1.2 + Sliding Window Eval (stride=64)
entries.summary: Combines a lower QK gain init for short-run stability with sliding-window evaluation giving 960+ context per token.

entries.title: Non-record: local RTX 4070 SP1024 7x512 KV4 500-step run
entries.summary: Local non-record RTX 4070 run explores a 7-layer KV4 configuration with 512d, 1024 seq, int8+zlib serialization under the 16MB cap.

entries.title: DenseContextQuantTrim 8xH100: 1.1779 val_bpb
entries.summary: Dense 9-layer transformer uses clip-search PTQ plus hybrid fp16/int8 embeddings with sliding-window 2048 validation across 8xH100 training.

entries.title: Record: FarnsworthEngine v1 — TTT + 11L Int6 MLP3x, val_bpb=1.1303
entries.summary: Stacks test-time SGD adaptation onto an 11-layer Int6 MLP3x with FlashAttention, NTK-RoPE, and Muon/SWA before sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Add qscale int6 bigram128 cross-provider record draft
entries.summary: PR135 derivative uses qscale int6 export with MLP_HIDDEN=1376 and full bigram128, removes fp16 passthrough, and evals via stride-16 sliding window.

entries.title: Add SP4096 11L432 MLP3x Int6+Zstd Momentum99 record (val_bpb=1.1596)
entries.summary: 11-layer 432-dim Transformer with 3× MLP, Muon momentum 0.99, and Int6+zstd compression for compact weights.

entries.title: Complexity MoE v4: Token-Routed I64 + PID + CUDA Scatter + Int6 (26.5M params)
entries.summary: Token-routed SwiGLU MoE with PID-like layer dynamics, cosine warm-restart schedule, and int6+zstd dispatch compression.

entries.title: non-record: int6 3xMLP + cosine warmdown (1.1704 bpb)
entries.summary: Int6 quantization frees budget for a 3x wider MLP, cosine warmdown decay, and orthogonal init atop the merged SOTA baseline.

entries.title: Non-record: local RTX 4070 SP1024 8x512 KV4 500-step run
entries.summary: Local RTX 4070 non-record run explores an 8-layer, 512-dim KV4 model with int8+zlib quantization and full published validation re-eval after single-shard training.

entries.title: Non-record: local RTX 4070 SP1024 8x512 KV4 seq768 500-step run
entries.summary: Throughput-oriented search produced an 8-layer, 512-dim KV4 model with tied embeddings and boosted LR trained on one shard and re-evaluated on full validation.

entries.title: Record: Int6 3xMLP + Cosine Warmdown (val_bpb=1.1704)
entries.summary: Int6 STE quant plus 3x MLP width and cosine warmdown on the merged SOTA with orthogonal init and RoPE base 50k keeps the build under 16MB.

entries.title: Crystal Curriculum — TF-IDF curriculum learning by Bee Bytez
entries.summary: Info-density Crystallizer oversamples TF-IDF scored batches, then linearly blend to uniform curriculum while scaling to 10 layers with Muon weight decay.

entries.title: [Non-record] Eval-time Adaptation: Stride-OGD + Two-Pass + NTK-RoPE
entries.summary: Eval-time Stride-OGD vocab bias updates, two-pass gradient correction, and NTK-RoPE rescaled context adapt the fixed model without retraining.

entries.title: Non-record: local RTX 4070 SP1024 7x512 KV2 500-step run
entries.summary: Local RTX 4070 non-record run fits a 16MB model by combining a shallow 7x512 KV2 architecture with tied embeddings and compact int8+zlib artifacts.

entries.title: [Non-record] Quantization Findings: SWA Reversal + Int5 Failure
entries.summary: Averaging 84 checkpoints via SWA smooths weights so int6+zstd quantization beats the last checkpoint, while int5 MLP quantization crashes undertrained models.

entries.title: Add 10L 4K long-context negative-result submission
entries.summary: Negative-result 10-layer Transformer with 4K training context, QAT, and sliding-window LoRA TTT evaluation, but coverage collapsed under the 10-minute budget.

entries.title: 4 the Leaderboard: 11L Int6 + SmearGate + Batch Optimization (val_bpb=1.1400)
entries.summary: 11L int6 model with SmearGate/BigramHash widens MLP, cuts batch tokens to squeeze more steps in 10‑min training while batched sliding eval keeps stride=64 viable.

entries.title: Record: 11L MLP3x + SmearGate + Error Correction Table
entries.summary: Uses an eval-time delta-encoded error correction table to boost logits for 908K fixed-val tokens alongside the 11L MLP3x SmearGate int6 stack.

entries.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + NorMuon + SmearGate + BigramHash + OrthoInit + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1541
entries.summary: Int6 quantization funds a 3x MLP with orthogonal muP init, NorMuon, SmearGate, and BigramHash token-pair context, evaluated via stride-256 sliding windows.

entries.title: [Non-Record] Zeno: 10-Layer Muon with Full CastedLinear Capacity (18.5M params)
entries.summary: 10-layer Transformer replaces LoRA with full CastedLinear matrices, trains with Muon + Sigmoid residual mixing, and int8+zlib compresses weights for eval-time LoRA TTT.

entries.title: Record: 10-Layer 4xMLP (val_bpb: 1.4444)
entries.summary: Expanded baseline to 10 layers with a 4x MLP, squeezing the 16MB budget with INT8+zlib compression and sliding-window eval plus batched LoRA tuning.

entries.title: Submission: Low-Rank All-Attention (1.3446 bpb)
entries.summary: Replaces transformer feed-forward layers with persistent-memory modules plus low-rank routing while INT8-quantizing tensors above 16K elements.

entries.title: Non-record: Int6 QAT + 11L 512d + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.2089
entries.summary: Muon-tuned training with STE fake-int6 QAT, flat int6 per-row storage, and sliding-window evaluation on an 11L×512 model to hit the 16MB budget.

entries.title: Draft: SOTA+ TTT + RoPE50K + EMA + Curriculum (pending H100 run)
entries.summary: Builds on PR#198 by adding RoPE50K, LAWA-EMA, a context-length curriculum, and val-set SGD TTT before scoring.

entries.title: Non-record: WiderMLP + FP16 Embed + Stride-32 (val_bpb=1.1601)
entries.summary: 10-layer GPT ups FFN width (MLP_MULT=3) plus fp16 tied embedding and mixed int6/int8 quantization with stride-32 sliding eval.

entries.title: Submission: 10L + Sliding Window eval (mean val_bpb=1.1899)
entries.summary: Trained the 10-layer model on 4k-token chunks and scored via stride-64 sliding windows so evaluation matches long-range training context.

entries.title: [WIP] SSM LRU Baseline — First State Space Model Submission
entries.summary: Replaces attention with LRU-based SSM blocks using complex diagonal recurrence, gated projections, and MuonAdamW tuning for 16MB non-transformer models.

entries.title: Non-record: 12L Int5-MLP + Int6-Attn mixed quantization, val_bpb=1.1541
entries.summary: Mixed int5 MLP and int6 attention quantization frees ~1.8MB to add a 12th transformer layer with SmearGate, BigramHash, and SWA.

entries.title: qat + ttt + value embeddings
entries.summary: Combines per-row fake int8 QAT, shared gated value embeddings, and TTT LoRA with SWA plus temperature search atop a 10-layer Muon base.

entries.title: Record: SP4096 int6+zstd 10L496 overtone+phase sliding (val_bpb=1.1753)
entries.summary: 10-layer 496-dim model pairs SP4096 BPE with int6-range quantization, zstd-22 export, fp16 tied embeddings, and sliding-window eval plus overtone/phase init.

entries.title: Record: 11L Low-Rank Q192 (val_bpb=1.1548)
entries.summary: Factorized the Q projection to rank 192, add 11-layer encoder-decoder skips, and pair int6 per-row quantization with zstd to fit the 16MB budget while using sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Non-record submission: recurrent 512 L3 6k (8x H100, 224s)
entries.summary: Compact shared-loop recurrent transformer (512 dim, 3 loop iterations) trained in 6k steps to fit the 10-minute 16MB non-record track.

entries.title: Record: Int6 + 3x MLP + sliding window (val_bpb=1.1708) + 9 ablations
entries.summary: Int6 per-row quantization plus zstd frees artifact budget to widen to a 3× MLP while sliding-window eval and ablations probe interactions.

entries.title: Add non-record 11L int6 challenger 8xH100 attempt
entries.summary: 11-layer int6 challenger run on 8xH100 copies muon optimizer + zstd quantization build while capping training to the 600s main-track window.

entries.title: Staging: Int6 MLP3x 11L + SmearGate + BigramHash4096x128 + MuonWD038 + SWA50 + DocSliding (single-run val_bpb=1.1568)
entries.summary: Dense 11x512 KV4 int6 model uses SmearGate, BigramHash, Muon WD, and SWA with doc-sliding int6_zstd_core export for leaderboard eval.

entries.title: Record: Int6 STE + SmearGate + Seq2048 + OrthoInit + RoPE50K + SWA/100 (mean val_bpb=1.1507)
entries.summary: Int6 STE quantization trains a NorMuon+WD 9-layer model with SmearGate gating, wider MLP, Seq2048+RoPE50K, SWA/100, and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: MetaStack v3: 1.1792 sliding bpb, 10L BigramHash SmearGate OrthoInit SWA
entries.summary: 10-layer GPT blends BigramHash embeddings, SmearGate gating, OrthoInit, SWA, and mixed int5/int6 quantization under sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Add record: INT6 10L SWA NorMuon, val_bpb=1.2320
entries.summary: 10-layer GPT blends INT6 quantization, SWA snapshot averaging, and NorMuon optimizer with aggressive warmdown to hit 16MB while boosting pre-quant quality.

entries.title: LAWA-EMA frontier fork (pr198 base, SWA -> LAWA val_bpb=1.1551)
entries.summary: Replaced SWA with LAWA-EMA and added overtone SVD-based embedding init plus sliding-window/BigramHash fixes atop PR198.

entries.title: Record: SP4096 + Int6 QAT + NorMuon (val_bpb=1.2012)
entries.summary: Stacks a SP4096 SentencePiece tokenizer with Int6 STE QAT plus zstd-22 compression and NorMuon tuning to fit a stronger model under 16MB.

entries.title: Non-record: SWA and doc-isolated eval ablation — two negative findings at stride=64
entries.summary: Controlled ablations isolate SWA’s effect under default warmdown and compare doc-isolated versus flat-stream sliding-window eval at stride 64 for quantized models.

entries.title: 11-Layer Int6 + WD=0.04 + SWA + FA3 (val_bpb: 1.1318)
entries.summary: Int6 MuP-scaled 11-layer transformer uses WD=0.04 Muon+AdamW plus SWA and stride-64 sliding eval to fit extra capacity under 16 MB.

entries.title: Non-record: staging profile (LAWA + slide eval) on 8xH100 (val_bpb=1.18926428)
entries.summary: Merged staging profile run enables LAWA defaults plus sliding-window evaluation on 8×H100 to validate the prod recipe at 10min/16MB scale.

entries.title: Add non-record submission: Structured-Memory FineWeb Smoke
entries.summary: Adapted a minimal structured-memory LM into the official train_gpt.py workflow to validate FineWeb/val_bpb evaluation, quantized export, and artifact-size accounting.

entries.title: 11L Int6 QAT + Per-Dim SmearGate + SWA: 1.1480 BPB (3-seed mean)
entries.summary: 11-layer int6 QAT model adds per-dim SmearGate, SWA, and strong Muon decay to stabilize weights for quantization-friendly inference.

entries.title: Add CTM tail-QAT proxy non-record snapshot
entries.summary: 1xH100 proxy run packages a causal CTM workspace with novelty/salience routing, error-gated skips, and export-matched tail QAT for int8 evaluation.

entries.title: Record: 11L Int6 QAT + SmearGate + WD 0.038 (val_bpb=1.1502)
entries.summary: 11-layer GPT trains with STE-based int6 QAT, SmearGate gating, decoupled Muon WD, and int6-in-int8 plus zstd compression for compact models.

entries.title: Record: Compression-Funded MLP3x (val_bpb=1.1598)
entries.summary: Int6 block-weight compression and fp16 protection fund a 3× MLP while seq2048 training and stride-256 sliding-window eval squeeze more capacity under 16MB.

entries.title: The Stinky Frost Recipe — 1.1725 BPB
entries.summary: 9-layer GQA model leans on int6 QAT from 25% training, FP16 tied embeddings, SmearGate bigram blending, BigramHash context, Muon WD, and stride-64 sliding eval.

entries.title: Record: Pre-Enrichment + Encoder Recurrence (val_bpb=1.1709)
entries.summary: Adds GELU pre-enrichment and 2× encoder recurrence for 15 effective layers, paired with int6 QAT and stride-64 sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Combined SOTA: INT6 + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA (val_bpb=1.1754)
entries.summary: INT6 quantization, SmearGate+BigramHash context, wider MLP, and muon+SWA tuning under sliding-window eval to stay within 16MB.

entries.title: Non-record: Wider-shallower 4x768 + QAT (1xH100, 1.3043 bpb)
entries.summary: Wider 4-layer 768-dim GQA model trained with aggressive Muon tuning and post-warmup STE-based QAT to concentrate compute per step and keep int8 gap tiny.

entries.title: Non-record: Cache LM + LoRA TTT (negative result on cache, positive on TTT)
entries.summary: Per-document rank-8 LoRA TTT on Q/V/lm_head paired with unigram cache LM interpolation to probe eval-time adaptivity on varied FineWeb docs.

entries.title: Non-record: Linearized Neural Memory + TTT (val_bpb=1.1844)
entries.summary: Adds closed-form Titans-style neural memory per block plus LoRA TTT, overtone init, quant tricks, and Muon WD for a 10-layer run.

entries.title: Aweb Optimized Baseline — 1.2194 BPB
entries.summary: NaiveBaseline kept intact while env-vars crank Muon momentum, halve LRs, 3× MLP, 2048-token training, grad clip, and train-on-val for better quantized convergence.

entries.title: Record: 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(0.4) + WD=0.04 (val_bpb=1.1428, mean 3 seeds)
entries.summary: Mixed int5 MLP/int6 attention quantization buys space for a 10-layer GPT with MuonWD regularization, SWA late averaging, and BigramHash.

entries.title: Record: 11L, int6+zstd, decoupled WD (val_bpb = 1.1472)
entries.summary: 11-layer GQA GPT uses int6+zstd compression, fp16 embeddings, sliding-window eval, and decoupled Muon weight decay to fit under 16MB.

entries.title: Add Nuclear Stack submission: 1.16668 BPB (seed 2884431328)
entries.summary: Stacks a GQA transformer with 3×MLP, SmearGate, BigramHash, Int6 quant, SWA, and full-model SGD test-time training while scoring via stride-32 sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Add submission: 10L Slide64 Mid6, val_bpb=1.1732
entries.summary: 10-layer sliding-window run keeps fp16 tied-embed passthrough and Muon crossover schedule while reducing tied-embedding LR and forcing mid blocks to int6 for tighter quant artifacts.

entries.title: Record: TTT LoRA + SOTA Training (10L MuonWD FP16Emb OvertoneInit)
entries.summary: Stacks document-isolated LoRA test-time adaptation onto the 10L Muon WD + FP16 embed SOTA recipe, running chunked eval after standard sliding-window quantized scoring.

entries.title: Add ContextFuse-2048-BigramSmear submission
entries.summary: Adds BigramHash/SmearGate int6 compression stack atop ContextFuse-2048 with Muon WD/SWA and corrected sliding-window scoring.

entries.title: Record submission : Int6 + MLP 3x + Flash Attention 3 + NorMuon, val_bpb = 1.1532
entries.summary: Int6-quantized 9-layer model triples MLP dim while using NorMuon and FlashAttention3 to streamline training/runtime with sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Add 3xMLP + Mixed Quant + Blockade/Sigma submission (val_bpb: 1.1812)
entries.summary: 3x MLP expansion with blockade/diverse attention and uncertainty-gated residuals, combined with mixed INT8/INT6 quantization to stay under 16MB.

entries.title: Sliding Window Eval + Muon6 (val_bpb 1.1973)
entries.summary: Combines sliding-window stride-256 eval with a 6-step Muon optimizer and tuned warmup/warmdown to stabilize training before the 10min eval cap.

entries.title: SOTA Attempt: Paid prefix (val_bpb=1.0238)
entries.summary: Splits the 16MB artifact into an 8.75MB compressed paid-prefix of known validation targets plus a 7L int8 transformer trained only on fineweb.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence via Layer Sharing (3 shared blocks → 1/3 params, matched BPB)
entries.summary: Weight-sharing cycles three unique blocks over nine virtual layers, cutting unique parameters while letting extra recurrence cycles boost eval without new blocks.

entries.title: Record: Long Context + All Optimizations submission
entries.summary: Combines long-context training (2048) with conservative Muon/LR scheduling plus sliding-window eval and FP16 tied embeddings.

entries.title: Submission: OrthoInit + Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash (val_bpb: 1.1524)
entries.summary: Orthogonal muP init, Muon tuning, Int6-mixed MLP expansion with SmearGate+BigramHash and FlashAttention 3 for 2048-token sliding eval.

entries.title: SwiGLU dim=576 + Sliding Window + Muon WD (1.2091 BPB)
entries.summary: Auto-searched wider 7-layer SwiGLU with Muon weight decay, FP16 embedding pass-through, and sliding-window eval to shrink artifacts under 16MB.

entries.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + SmearGate + BigramHash + MuonWD + SWA (mean val_bpb=1.1483)
entries.summary: Int6 quantization lets a 9-layer GPT scale to 3× MLP width while SmearGate/BigramHash embeddings and muP-informed Muon+SWA refine training.

entries.title: Record:Add TTT-LoRA 512d submission (val_bpb=1.1957)
entries.summary: Baseline 512d/9-layer transformer uses per-row int8+zlib compression with LoRA-based test-time training (TTT-LoRA) within the 10min limit.

entries.title: Record: MLP3x + Int8 Tok Emb + Grouped LZMA + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.1623)
entries.summary: 9L GQA transformer with 3x MLP trained at seq_len=2048, quantized to int6 (asset int8 token emb) and exported via grouped QGv3+LZMA for sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Record:Add TTT-LoRA 512d submission (val_bpb=1.1957)
entries.summary: Baseline 512d/9-layer (8-head, 4-KV) transformer with int8+zlib compression leans on test-time LoRA adaptation for its best 10-minute score.

entries.title: feat(record): Int6 STE + NorMuon + SWA + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.16019)
entries.summary: Combines Int6 STE per-row fake quant, NorMuon + SWA tuning, and sliding-window eval to widen the MLP while staying under 16MB.

entries.title: Record: sliding eval, FP16 tied embeddings, 10 layers, Muon WD 0.02, overtone init, and phase-transition residual mixing. (val_bpb 1.1876)
entries.summary: 10-layer Muon WD model using FP16 tied embeddings, overtone spectral init, residual-mix start, and sliding-window final evaluation.

entries.title: Non-record: Cross-layer parameter sharing + 4-bit QAT (RecurrentGPT)
entries.summary: RecurrentGPT packs 14-layer behavior into a 2-1-2 shared prelude/recurrent/coda stack with per-iteration gates plus 4-bit QAT under the 16MB cap.

entries.title: Add TTT (Test-Time Training) submission: 1.1767 BPB
entries.summary: TTT reuses eval time for 2-epoch full-model SGD on the validation shard, letting the baseline 9x512 GQA model adapt before sliding-window scoring.

entries.title: Non-record: FP16 embed + WD20k + seq2048 + doc-isolated sliding window (val_bpb=1.2045)
entries.summary: Stacked FP16 tied embedding export, aggressive warmdown, seq2048 training, tuned optimizer settings, and doc-isolated sliding-window eval on the 9L baseline.

entries.title: Record: 11L Int6 QAT + SmearGate + OrthoInit + SWA + TTT (val_bpb=1.1478)
entries.summary: 11-layer int6-QAT transformer stacks SmearGate blending, BigramHash, NTK-RoPE, muP-scored projections, Muon+SWA optimizer stack, and TTT with sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Add Combined Int6 + QAT + Sliding Window submission
entries.summary: Combines Int6 quant with late-K passthrough, late-stage QAT, and sliding-window eval plus cosine warmdown and Muon/AdamW tweaks for robust compression.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence + Cross-Repeat Skip + Sliding Window Eval
entries.summary: Shared 3-block depth recurrence with cross-repeat skips, value embeddings, and sliding-window eval boosts effective depth efficiently.

entries.title: Record/smaller batch sota, val_bpb 1.16314679 (post-quant, int6+zlib, sliding eval)
entries.summary: SOTA stack trims TRAIN_BATCH_TOKENS to boost optimizer steps while relying on sliding eval plus tighter int8 clipping and float32 per-row scales for quant-friendly int6 export.

entries.title: Non-record: Warmdown-Tuned Training (val_bpb=1.2987) on 1xRTX 5090
entries.summary: Warmdown-tuning a 9-layer GPT (3000 warmdown iters) shows cosine LR warmdown produces 2.6× efficiency gains while probing register tokens and layer looping.

entries.title: Non-record: QAT ablation — int8 QAT overhead exceeds quantization gap recovery
entries.summary: Quant-match int8 QAT on the 9L×512 baseline uses torch.quantile fake quantization to mimic export, showing its overhead exceeds the modest gap recovery.

entries.title: Add MPK 8x384 10-minute submission record
entries.summary: MPK multi-path causal 8×384 GQA KV4 LM with 2×4 MPK strides, tied embeddings, and tuned LR plus SentencePiece marker fix for accurate eval.

entries.title: Add ContextFuse-2048 submission
entries.summary: Combines 2048-token training, sliding-window evaluation, fp16 tied embeddings, and Muon-tuned LR width tweaks for a byte-safe baseline submission.

entries.title: Non-record: Systematic Hyperparameter Search (val_bpb=1.2075)
entries.summary: Systematically tuned Muon optimizer, ROPE_BASE and 4k context length via tiered paired comparisons before final 8×H100 validation.

entries.title: Non-record: BitNet b1.58 — 65M ternary params beat 4-hour baseline in 10 minutes (val_bpb=1.2029)
entries.summary: BitNet b1.58 trains a 64.5M-parameter ternary transformer with STE BitLinear layers and base-3 packing to squeeze maximal Chinchilla-scaled capacity into 15MB.

entries.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + STE QAT + NorMuon + sliding window (val_bpb 1.1666)
entries.summary: Combines STE fake-int6 QAT, NorMuon+SWA, and 3x-expanded MLP under mixed quantization with sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Record: Seq2048 training + eval (val_bpb=1.2101)
entries.summary: Train/eval on 2048-token spans so the baseline model learns long-range RoPE positions rather than extrapolating at test time.

entries.title: Record: OrthoInit + Int6 MLP3x + BigramHash + SmearGate (val_bpb: 1.1539)
entries.summary: muP-scaled orthogonal init plus zstd-compressed int6 lets GPT-9 grow a 3x MLP, add SmearGate/bigram hash, and use tuned Muon optimizer.

entries.title: [WIP] add combined optimization, waiting for 8 gpu train
entries.summary: Combines SwiGLU blocks, int6 quant/Aware-training, cosine LR, and adaptive batch/stride logic with sliding-window eval for the 10min/16MB track.

entries.title: Non-record: Muon-Aware QAT + LAWA + Adaptive LR Scheduling (7 toggleable improvements)
entries.summary: Combines Muon-aware late-start QAT with LAWA smoothing, adaptive LR scheduling, and compression tweaks tailored to Muon’s quant sensitivity.

entries.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + STE QAT + Sliding Window (val_bpb=1.1594)
entries.summary: Int6 per-row quantization with STE QAT frees budget for a 3× wider MLP while sliding-window scoring keeps nearly full context.

entries.title: Non-record: Depth recurrence + widening + QAT + sliding window eval
entries.summary: Depth-recurrent 3-block transformer with widened heads and per-loop LoRA, ALBERT-style embeddings, and STE-driven int6 QAT with sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Non-record: BitNet b1.58 + depth recurrence + NorMuon (1.7510 BPB, 3.78 MB)
entries.summary: Ternary-packed BitNet b1.58 uses depth recurrence with U-Net skips, NorMuon optimizer, and YaRN warmup to fit a larger model in 3.78MB.

entries.title: Add non-record 16MB layers7 submission
entries.summary: A non-record 16MB run uses a 7-layer, 512-dim GPT variant on train_gpt.py to trade depth for throughput under the 600s cap.

entries.title: Record: Vocab 4096 + MLP 3x + Sliding Window Eval (mean val_bpb=1.1642, 3 seeds)
entries.summary: Int6 quant enables a 4096-vocab, 3×MLP GPT trained on 4096-context with SWA, followed by sliding-window eval for richer scoring.

entries.title: Record: Sliding Window Eval, 2048 Vocab Size, fp16 embeddings, SWA, NorMuon, FA3; mean_val_bpb:1.160
entries.summary: Combines a 2048-BPE tokenizer with fp16 embeddings, NorMuon blocks, int6 weights via FA3-aware fake quantization, SWA, and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: [Val Only]: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + sliding window, val_bpb=0.9588
entries.summary: Val-only 9-layer transformer widens MLP to 3x and trains with STE int6 QAT, mixed int6/int8 quantization, Muon tweaks, and sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Add Psionic non-record runtime replay submission
entries.summary: Psionic's non-record bundle ships a prebuilt runtime plus train_gpt.py to restore its int8+zlib artifact and rerun the bounded local-reference eval.

entries.title: Non-record: 1x RTX 4090 compat smoke (50 steps)
entries.summary: Baseline 9×512 SP-1024 on a single RTX 4090 with manual KV-head expansion so SDPA runs without enable_gqa for a reproducible CUDA compatibility smoke test.

entries.title: Record: Int6 + MLP 3x + STE QAT + NorMuon + sliding window (val_bpb 1.1666)
entries.summary: Combines STE fake-int6 QAT, 3x MLP expansion, NorMuon updates, and SWA-warmed sliding-window eval to make mixed int6 quantization practical.

entries.title: #1 on leaderboard: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training
entries.summary: Selective fp16 passthrough atop int6 quantization frees budget for 3x MLP and 2048-token training, evaluated via stride-256 sliding windows.

entries.title: Record: FP16 Embed + Sliding Window Eval + Warmdown Tuning (pending eval)
entries.summary: Quantizes with FP16 tied embeddings, stride-64 sliding-window eval, and a tuned warmdown/LR schedule for better convergence under the 10-min cap.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence 5x3 d672 SwiGLU
entries.summary: Repeat eight SwiGLU blocks three times for 15-layer depth with SmearGate+BigramHash context and int6+zstd compression, training at seqlen 2048.

entries.title: Non-record unlimited-compute: 1-hour 1xH100 warmdown 9x512
entries.summary: Extended 1xH100 9x512 run with WARMDOWN_ITERS=100 to push longer single-GPU scaling while staying under the 16MB artifact cap.

entries.title: Submission: Top-Heavy FFN Allocation + Packed Int6 Export | pending eval
entries.summary: Top-heavy FFN allocation shifts capacity to deeper blocks while keeping the 9x512 backbone, paired with packed int6 export and sliding-window eval readiness.

entries.title: Record: 11L MLP3x + SmearGate + Error Correction Table
entries.summary: Quantized 11L MLP3x + SmearGate base builds a delta-encoded correction table at eval time to boost logits for the model’s worst val predictions.

entries.title: Int6+zstd MLP1488 + Sliding Window + QAT + Tuned LR (val_bpb=1.1648)
entries.summary: Int6 mixed quantization + zstd compression on key weights, wider MLP, sliding-window eval, and short post-training QAT with tuned Muon LRs.

entries.title: record: 1.158
entries.summary: Reuses PR88's quantization-aware training tricks and export flow to meet the 16MB golf constraint.

entries.title: Non-record: Stacked hyperparameter tuning + eval2048 (RTX 5090, val_bpb 1.336)
entries.summary: Autoresearch loop stacks WARMDOWN_ITERS, LR, softcap, momentum, and batch-token tweaks before eval2048 on the 9x512 baseline.

entries.title: Non-record: Looped Transformer + LoRA + Skip Connections + NorMuon + SWA + Int6 + Sliding Window
entries.summary: Looped 5-block transformer uses per-virtual-layer LoRA and skip connections to span 30 virtual layers while training with NorMuon and Int6 quantization plus sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Int6 MLP3x + Tuned LR + SmearGate + SlidingWindow (val_bpb: 1.1618)
entries.summary: Per-row int6 quant + zstd frees space for a 3× MLP GPT that blends bigrams via SmearGate before attention and uses sliding-window eval.

entries.title: submission: Int6 MLP3x + Late-K Passthrough + SlidingWindow (val_bpb: 1.1605)
entries.summary: Int6-quantized 9-layer GPT3x MLP with fp16 late-layer K plus grouped int8 elsewhere, paired with stride-64 sliding-window evaluation.

entries.title: Sliding Window + Long-Context Training: val_bpb=1.1764
entries.summary: Train 2048 tokens with high Muon momentum, tight clipping, and stride-512 sliding-window eval to capture long context with more steps.

entries.title: PROTEUS EMA — val_bpb: 1.2253
entries.summary: Stacks EMA weight averaging, 2048-length context, FP16 embeddings, and sliding-window eval to lower INT8 quantization loss without architectural change.

entries.title: Non-record: Warmdown fix (9x512) on 1xH100 10m
entries.summary: Same 9x512 baseline swaps to a 100-iter warmdown so 1xH100 steps keep a higher LR without changing architecture or data.

entries.title: Non-record: Compact 12x384 1xH100 10m
entries.summary: Tests a 12-layer, 384-dim GQA Transformer with tied embeddings to shrink the int8+zlib artifact under 16MB in a 1xH100 10m run.

entries.title: Record: 8192 Vocab, Sliding Window Eval, Selective Quantization; 1.194 val_bpb
entries.summary: 8-layer model uses SP-8192 tokenizer, NorMuon, stride-256 sliding window eval, and selective w6e8 quantization for compact, accurate scoring.

entries.title: [codex] add gw kv2 int7 non-record submission
entries.summary: Dense 9-layer KV2 branch trades KV heads for a 1248-width MLP, lowers quantizer passthrough thresholds, and applies int7 mid-layer coarsening with a reduced LR schedule.

entries.title: record:  val_bpb=1.1622, NorMuon + int6 STE + SWA + sliding window
entries.summary: Combines NorMuon optimizer with STE int6 training, fp16 embed passthrough, wider MLP, SWA warmdown, and sliding-window eval stride 64.

entries.title: Record: Int6 MLP3x + MTP + Sliding Window Eval (val_bpb=1.1605)
entries.summary: Int6 per-row quantization with zstd-22 compression lets a 3× MLP, seq4096/MTP training, and sliding-window eval fit under 16MB.

entries.title: Update: 11L MLP3x + WD=0.04 + zstd-22 (val_bpb 1.1502)
entries.summary: 11-layer MLP3x transformer with int6 QAT, tied embeddings, Muon/AdamW decay, zstd-22 compression, and sliding-window eval to fit 16MB.

entries.title: Record (pending): 92-experiment autoresearch + sliding window eval, pre-quant val_bpb=1.2156
entries.summary: Auto-researched 92 configs, ported winner to 8×H100 with sliding-window eval, RoPE extrapolation, relu²+RMSNorm for int8, and Muon+AdamW mix.

entries.title: Add mirrored-recurrence MLX non-record submission
entries.summary: Mirrored recurrence reuses nine transformer blocks to double logical depth, running encoder forward and decoder backward without growing parameter count.

entries.title: Record: SwiGLU + MLP 3x + Int6 + LoRA TTT, val_bpb=1.1670 (8xH100)
entries.summary: Stacks 3x SwiGLU MLP, int6+QAT, and LoRA test-time training per document to fit a wider 10-layer transformer within the artifact budget.

entries.title: Add Aria local sweep tooling and non-record 16MB runs
entries.summary: Adds local fast-sweep tooling plus rule-compliant full-val non-record submissions using 8x576 KV4 models with tuned RoPE bases and int8+zlib serialization.

entries.title: Depth Recurrence: 3x3x1024 (non-record, pending H100)
entries.summary: Depth recurrence reuses three transformer blocks to trade depth for width with NorMuon and Int6 QAT within the 16MB cap.

entries.title: Record: 8192 Vocab Size, NorMuon, Selective Quantization; 1.186 val_bpb
entries.summary: Pairs an 8192-token BPE tokenizer with NorMuon and selective int6 weight/int8 embedding quantization to explore precision trade-offs.

entries.title: [record bpb=1.195] sliding window + LoRA TTT
entries.summary: Baseline training with document-isolated sliding-window eval adds per-document LoRA TTT (rank-8 on lm_head/q/v) to adapt each chunk.

entries.title: 12L Int5-MLP + SmearGate + BigramHash + SWA (val_bpb 1.1468)
entries.summary: 12-layer GQA transformer uses int5/int6 per-row quantization, SmearGate, BigramHash, U-Net skips, and SWA-ed Muon scheduling to stay compact yet expressive.

entries.title: Add seq4096 sliding-window fp16 tok coarsen record
entries.summary: Seq4096 sliding-window with tuned Muon, fp16 tok emb retention, selective block coarsening, and stride-64 scoring.

entries.title: Add seq4096 fp16 tok coarsen record
entries.summary: Seq_len 4096 run with tuned Muon schedule, keeping tok_emb fp16 and coarsening only blocks.5 to fit the 16MB export.

entries.title: Non-record: SwiGLU + warmdown fix + quarter batch (1x5090, 1.3281 bpb)
entries.summary: SwiGLU MLPs, a time-fraction warmdown fix, and quarter-batch plus gradient accumulation boost optimizer steps on single RTX 5090 under the 16MB cap.

entries.title: Add Parameter Golf submission: Depth12 Dim416 KV4
entries.summary: 10-min 8×H100 run uses a deeper-narrower 12-layer, 416-dim Transformer with tied embeddings to stay under the 16MB cap while mirroring the baseline.

entries.title: Submission: Wider MLP 3x + int6 quant + sliding window eval, val_bpb=1.1659
entries.summary: Wider 3x MLP, int6 per-row weight quantization with zstd-22, and sliding-window stride-256 eval combine to boost validation signal while staying under 16MB.

entries.title: SubSixteen v2: Int6 QAT + MLP 3x + SWA + Sliding Window (val_bpb 1.1708)
entries.summary: Int6 QAT on a 9-layer GPT with 3x MLP, Muon/AdamW mix, SWA warmdown, sliding-window eval, and zstd-22 export to squeeze under 16MB.

entries.title: ArjunAutoResearch: MLP 3x + STE int6 QAT + seq4096 + sliding window. val_bpb 1.1632
entries.summary: Auto-research agent stacks wider MLP, 4k context, tuned Muon optimizer, STE int6 QAT, fp16 tied embedding passthrough, per-row int6 quant, sliding-window eval.

entries.title: Record: Mixed Quant Int6/FP16 + SmearGate + OrthoInit + MLP 3x + Sliding Window, val_bpb=1.1556
entries.summary: Combined SmearGate bigram gating, orthogonal init/Muon optimizer, and int6 STE QAT with sliding-window eval on a 9-layer transformer.

entries.title: Record Update: val_bpb=0.9271 (val-only) + 1.1465 (standard)
entries.summary: SmearGate+BigramHash core with sliding-window eval; val-only run adds STE fake-int6 QAT + zstd while the standard mix uses int6/int8 with fp16 passthrough, Muon + SWA.

entries.title: Record: 10L Int6 QAT + Zstd MLP2.6x Muon0.99 Sliding Window (val_bpb 1.1598)
entries.summary: STE int6 QAT + full int6 quantization with zstd-22 compression lets them widen to a 1344 hidden MLP and run sliding-window eval with Muon 0.99.

entries.title: WIP: Add adaptive eval-time context non-record MLX submission
entries.summary: Adds MLX adaptive eval-time context with a coarse-to-fine rescore pass on hard windows, trading more eval time for improved roundtrip coverage over fixed strides.

entries.title: Record: Sliding Window + FP16 Embed + 10L + Muon WD + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.1748)
entries.summary: Combines sliding-window scoring, FP16 tied embeddings, Muon with decoupled weight decay, and spectral+residual inits to support a 10-layer config.

entries.title: NTK Eval + Overtone Init (val_bpb=1.2160)
entries.summary: Introduces overtone SVD-based embedding init, sigmoid phase-transition resid mix, and NTK-aware RoPE scaling to extend evaluation context beyond training length.

entries.title: Add Deep14x416 KV2 non-record MLX submission (val_bpb=1.8440)
entries.summary: Documents a deeper/narrower 14×416 SP-1024 KV2 MLX run on Apple Silicon by reusing the repo trainer while trading width for depth and tuning eval batch/chunking.

entries.title: Add RecursoLM v0 non-record submission scaffold
entries.summary: Recurrent parameter-tied transformer uses ALiBi multi-query attention and SwiGLU with a learned gate to trade stored parameters for iterative depth.

entries.title: RQZ-Golf v1: Depth recurrence for parameter efficiency
entries.summary: Shares a recurrent block across passes with iteration embeddings and scaled residuals to extend depth per parameter and boost inference K.

entries.title: 1.1888 BPB via SP-4096 compression + stride-64 sliding window
entries.summary: Combine SP-4096 tokenizer compression with stride-64 sliding-window eval on an 8-layer GQA encoder-decoder trained with Muon to shrink BPB.

entries.title: New SOTA attempt (val_bpb=1.2014)
entries.summary: Long-context (train seq 4096) 9×512 KV4 run with aggressive Muon tuning (0.99 momentum, low LR, warmdown) to sharpen quantized quality.

entries.title: [WIP] Depth-recurrent QAT: 3x4 loops, 768d, 15.6MB artifact
entries.summary: Shared 3-block transformer loops depth-recurrence with per-loop LoRA and QAT to widen to 768 dims while supporting int8 export.

entries.title: [Submission] Warmdown Scheduling - 1.2430 BPB on 8×H100 SXM
entries.summary: Extended warmdown iterations so cosine LR decay triggers in the final third of 600s runs for better convergence on capped hardware.

entries.title: Modal 8xH100 LowerLR FP16Embed 960 (val_bpb 1.22395)
entries.summary: Modal 8xH100 lowers LR with tied FP16 embeddings and trims MLP hidden to 960 before int8+zlib quant to meet the 16MB cap.

entries.title: val-only 10min record (val_bpb:1.1111)
entries.summary: Baseline ties-embeddings 9x512 model trained solely on the validation shard for the 10-minute, 16MB track to document a val-only regime.

entries.title: Add Modal 8xH100 timed validation non-record submission
entries.summary: 10-minute Modal 8xH100 run reuses the current train_gpt.py snapshot with the published FineWeb sp1024 export and int8+zlib serialization for a timed validation non-record entry.

entries.title: PhiDelay Shared-Recurrent LM (3.23 bpb, 6.84MB)
entries.summary: PhiDelay-inspired shared-recurrent transformer reuses three physical blocks with gated delay mixing across four passes to deliver a compact, 12-layer LM.

entries.title: Record: 10L Mixed Precision: val_bpb=1.2147 (10 layers + int6 middle layers)
entries.summary: 10-layer transformer keeps int8 early/late layers, int6 middle layers, and uses lower Muon/Adam learning rates to fit under 16MB with better compression.

entries.title: Record: SP4096 + Int6 QAT + NorMuon (val_bpb=1.2012)
entries.summary: Pairs an SP4096 SentencePiece tokenizer with Int6 STE QAT and NorMuon-tuned LR to compress under 16MB without changing core architecture.

entries.title: [Partial submission] naive baseline + dispersion loss
entries.summary: Fixed 9-layer/512-dim GPT uses dispersion loss regularization and published fineweb10B_sp1024 tokenizer, evaluated via int8+zlib roundtrip.

entries.title: Non-record: Depth-recurrent 5x3 d768, val_bpb=1.2663
entries.summary: Five shared transformer blocks looped three times at dim 768 mimic 15 layers, trading width for depth via depth-recurrent reuse on the Non-record track.

entries.title: [WIP] Recurrent MQA Transformer — depth recurrence + weight tying (nidhilak-Aquarius)
entries.summary: Loops a single shared Transformer block 12× with tied embeddings, MQA, RoPE, and SwiGLU to exploit depth recurrence and parameter regularization.

entries.title: Improved baseline: recurrent depth + LoRA + MTP
entries.summary: Weight-shared five-block transformer loops twice with learned recurrence scales, LoRA adapters, and wider 704-dim heads plus SwiGLU MLP.

entries.title: QAT + Architecture Exploration (Non-Record)
entries.summary: Implements STE-driven quantization-aware training with fake int8 per-row quant on all linear layers while keeping evaluation on unquantized weights.

entries.title: Add depth recurrence + SwiGLU submission (Apple M3 8GB)
entries.summary: Depth recurrence reuses 4 unique transformer blocks with per-pass gates plus SwiGLU MLPs to enable a wider 640-dim U-Net variant on constrained Apple M3 hardware.

entries.title: Please delete this PR
entries.summary: Baseline 9×512 transformer trains with late-phase STE-based QAT and grad clipping to recover int8 robustness without architectural tweaks.
